text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
...
Hey.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Hm? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
The way Fine Motion runs is... Well, it's pretty
impressive, right?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She looks like she's having a lot of fun out there...
Yeah, it's very nice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion does fantastic in the race, so I'm
expecting her to come back in her usual high
spirits. However...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That... was... so... muuuuch... FUUUUUN! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: The Classics really are amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The intensity coming off the others racing beside
me was positively electrifying!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's hard to believe there are more races like—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Are you okay? You seem kind of tense.
choice_data_list: So the reason you looked so pained was...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ehe, yeah, I guess I got too worked up!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: But I feel absolutely tip-top! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I can see how that must have been misleading. I
was just so happy...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But I understand. I'll be careful not to do anything
to worry you again.
choice_data_list: You can conduct yourself however you like.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I'll have no shortage of worries in the
future. But I want Fine Motion to focus on
enjoying what's right in front of her without
troubling herself over it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, now you've gone and said it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So that means you're okay with me eating as
much ramen as I want before training?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I just meant that I want her to forget about her
circumstances and her surroundings and live
freely in the truest sense of the word when she's
around me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I know what you meant. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I'm going to run to my heart's content!
Next up is the Japanese Oaks!
choice_data_list: Your wish is my command, Your Highness.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I forbid you from calling me that, Trainer! You
may call me "Fine." Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's having so much fun. Must be
nice...

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Must be nice getting treated like a princess, huh?
